narrative:
Randolph Township has 3,710 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
